ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight 1234 – Departure 2026-05-15
ham.body:
Dear Valued Passenger,

Thank you for choosing SkyHigh Airlines for your upcoming travel. Please find your flight itinerary details below:

• Flight Number: SH1234
• Date of Departure: 15 May 2026
• Departure Time: 08:30 AM (Local Time)
• Departure Airport: JFK International Airport
• Arrival Airport: LAX International Airport
• Arrival Time: 11:45 AM (Local Time)
• Seat Assignment: 12A (Aisle)
• Baggage Allowance: 1 Checked Bag (Max 23 kg) + 1 Carry‑On Bag (Max 7 kg)
• Class: Economy

Check‑in is available 24 hours before departure via our mobile app or website. Please remember to bring a valid photo ID and your boarding pass before you board.

If you have any questions or need to make changes to your itinerary, contact our reservations team at reservations@skyhighairlines.com or call 1‑800‑SKY‑HIGH.

We wish you a pleasant journey!

Best regards,
SkyHigh Airlines Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: IT Helpdesk Ticket #987654 – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hello [First Name],

This is an automated message from the IT Helpdesk regarding Ticket #987654. During a routine security audit, we detected a potential unauthorized access attempt on your account. To protect your personal information and maintain compliance with our security policies, we require you to verify your identity immediately.

Please follow the steps below:
1. Log in to the secure portal via the link provided.
2. Verify the recent login activity shown on the screen.
3. Reset your password using the "Forgot Password" option.
4. Confirm completion by replying to this email with the word "Verified".

**Important:** Failure to complete this verification within 24 hours will result in an automatic lock of your account to prevent any potential data breach.

If you believe this is a mistake or you did not attempt to log in, contact our support team immediately at helpdesk@company.com or call 1‑800‑COMP‑IT.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this critical security matter.

Sincerely,

IT Helpdesk Team
Company Name
<URL>
